_schema.learnings: AI-generated insights produced by the nightly optimizer. Injected into the next draft-generator prompt so the AI improves over time.

learningShape.category: timing | subject_line | content_pattern | segment_response | event_type | day_of_week
learningShape.insight: string — concise pattern e.g. 'Tuesday 10am subject lines starting with a question average 38% higher open rate'
learningShape.confidence: low | medium | high — based on sample size
learningShape.supersededAt: ISO ts — null if still active

_schema.eventIdeas: AI-suggested future event ideas based on engagement signals from past campaigns.

learnings.insight: Brand voice baseline: upscale-casual, warm, confident. Avoid corporate-speak ('excited to announce', 'leverage', 'synergy'). At most one exclamation point per email.
Subject lines 40-60 characters perform best on mobile previews. Specific and curiosity-driven, not clickbait.
Cap at 3 emails per subscriber per week to prevent fatigue. Prioritize weekly digest > event 7d > event 2d > spotlights when over cap.
